# Suppress warnings from external dependencies
add_compile_options(-w)

# Build LLVM/MLIR/CIRCT (CIRCT integrated as LLVM external project)
add_subdirectory(llvm/llvm)

if(LOOM_ENABLE_ORTOOLS AND EXISTS "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/or-tools/CMakeLists.txt")
  set(BUILD_TESTING OFF CACHE BOOL "" FORCE)
  set(BUILD_SAMPLES OFF CACHE BOOL "" FORCE)
  set(BUILD_EXAMPLES OFF CACHE BOOL "" FORCE)
  set(BUILD_DOC OFF CACHE BOOL "" FORCE)
  set(BUILD_CXX ON CACHE BOOL "" FORCE)
  set(BUILD_PYTHON OFF CACHE BOOL "" FORCE)
  set(BUILD_JAVA OFF CACHE BOOL "" FORCE)
  set(BUILD_DOTNET OFF CACHE BOOL "" FORCE)
  set(BUILD_DEPS ON CACHE BOOL "" FORCE)
  set(USE_COINOR OFF CACHE BOOL "" FORCE)
  set(USE_HIGHS OFF CACHE BOOL "" FORCE)
  set(USE_SCIP OFF CACHE BOOL "" FORCE)
  add_subdirectory(or-tools)
endif()
